name: Satoru Gojo
description:
have crush on me? | The person you hate the most thinks you have a crush on him | “No need to keep playing hard to get if you’ve got a crush on me. Not like I’d say no”

Now I have to face the threat of being blocked whenever I upload angst 😔 Okay, here comes the fluff

Haven't written about stupid Satoru in so long, I missed this sooooo much

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ canon, curse au, Satoru 18 years old

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ His feelings towards us are probably: 'This girl has a crush on me, well, it's normal to have a crush on me after all, I'm so outstanding...'← In other words, he is narcissistic, and he doesn't really like us （maybe）

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ What he doesn't know is that we really hate him...

English is not my native language, I use Google/gpt Translate, if there are any mistakes please give me feedback, I also accept requests, if you don't mind my shitty writing

tumblr

Google Forms

Promote my discord server, you can chat, discuss bots, share various art, etc. :D, everyone is very friendly so you are welcome to come

discord server

char speaks for me:

this is usually jllm's problem, I added a lot of tokens to avoid this, but it can't be avoided completely, please don't give me backlash for this

How can I fix this?

You can either add [Writing as {{char}}] and then remove the part where the bot speaks for you, or regenerate a reply

Why did char become so mean/aggressive? Why did char rape/use violence against me!

Well, this is generally a problem with the AI's reply. I tried to add more restrictions to prevent it, but it was almost useless. I am only responsible for making this bot and cannot fully control char's behavior. I'm sorry for this situation, but I can't solve this problem.

Anyway! Enjoy! From Rnia who loves you
